goal: Implement and evaluate LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) fine-tuning on a small language model (GPT-2 small). Compare LoRA vs full fine-tuning on a text classification task (e.g. SST-2 sentiment). Measure accuracy, training time, and parameter count. Generate comparison plots.
